certainty-seeker.description: Wants predictable, consistent income. Fears variability. Often asks for guaranteed rent.
certainty-seeker.conversion_approach: Show monthly floor not just average. Emphasise payout on 1st-5th never missed. Frame range as low-risk upside not volatility.
hard_stops: Guaranteed rent demand on 1-bed = pre-qualify out (Stayful cannot offer on 1-bed)
successful_reframes: Compare to LTL worst-case not just average

loss-averse-switcher.description: Currently in LTL or self-managing, motivated by Renters Reform / regulatory change. Fears losing tenants or losing control.
loss-averse-switcher.conversion_approach: Lead with Renters Reform threat. Frame STL as protection against regulatory risk. Emphasise 90-day rule (if applicable) and council tax Business Rates switch.
trigger_language: 'Maximise returns if not getting long-term security'

analytical-evaluator.description: Wants data, comparisons, projected income. Makes decisions slowly. Often comparing providers.
analytical-evaluator.conversion_approach: Lead with projections upfront. Show honest comparison (including LTL worst-case). Call out developer/competitor numbers that omit costs. Use case studies.
analytical-evaluator.case_study_power: York case study (£36k→£48k direct bookings) works well for this archetype

urgency-driven.description: External deadline forcing action. Relocating, selling, tenants leaving.
urgency-driven.conversion_approach: Match urgency. Emphasise how fast Stayful can onboard. Make deadline real. Special offer tied to deadline reinforces urgency.
what_moves_them: Clear action plan for next 2 weeks

status-quo-resistant.description: Not convinced STL is better than current situation. Needs significant evidence before moving.
status-quo-resistant.conversion_approach: Don't push. Let projections speak. Offer trial framing if possible. Address setup effort directly — Stayful handles the hard parts.

betrayal-damaged.description: Had a bad experience with a previous agent or tenant. Trust is the conversion requirement.
betrayal-damaged.conversion_approach: Acknowledge the pain first. Explain specifically how Stayful’s vetting/management prevents recurrence. Use concrete protocols not vague reassurances.

specific_sub_types.agent_underperformance: EX-STL with <3 reviews in 6+ months — highest conversion probability. Show review count comparison immediately.
specific_sub_types.tenant_misuse: Brothel/drugs incidents — vetting protocols are the conversion lever
specific_sub_types.maintenance_failure: Show maintenance response standards and deposit claim process

social-proof-dependent.description: Needs to see others like them have succeeded. Responds to case studies and reviews.
social-proof-dependent.conversion_approach: Similar-location, similar-property case studies. Review counts. Portfolio size as proof of scale.

fast-path-gain-focused.description: Ready to act. Needs clear next steps not more analysis. Already convinced of STL.
fast-path-gain-focused.conversion_approach: Move fast. Onboarding conversation not sales conversation. Photography booking, key safe order, listing preparation are the next steps.
